hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const planDir='.planning/phases';try{const h=fs.readFileSync('docs/LEARNINGS.md','utf8');const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);const hasHandoff=h.includes('['+today)&&h.includes('HANDOFF:');const hasPlanning=fs.existsSync(planDir);if(!hasHandoff&&hasPlanning){console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'\u26a0\ufe0f  Handoff not written yet. Ask Claude to run the post-phase retrospective before clearing context.'}));}}catch(e){}"
